positive: Minimalist geometric mountain silhouette scene, rendered with a deep indigo and burnt orange color palette. The composition features stylized, stacked peaks and abstract forest elements (pine trees, stylized ferns) arranged symmetrically around the center point. Clean lines, bold negative space contrast, highly graphic, suitable for embroidery or screen printing. Inspired by Art Deco and modern folk art. Studio lighting, flat vector style, high resolution, solid colors, no gradients.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grainy, low detail, 3d render, photorealism, gradient, messy, complex background
